Finding: 3 loan files missing updated Aadhaar copies. KYC not re-verified post address change.
Recommendation: Immediate re-KYC for affected accounts. Strengthen address change trigger.

Finding: Physical files not arranged chronologically. 5 files missing valuation reports in hard copy.
Recommendation: Implement digital checklist verification before file closure.

Finding: 2 cases with LTV exceeding 80% without documented deviation approval in file.
Recommendation: Post-facto deviation approval to be obtained immediately. Process control strengthened.
Management_Response: Escalated to Credit Head. Deviation memos being prepared.

Finding: 1 NRI file missing FEMA compliance declaration. Power of Attorney not independently verified.
Recommendation: Obtain FEMA declaration. POA verification through Indian consulate.

Finding: 3 accounts found with manually overridden rates without documented approval.
Recommendation: System controls to prevent manual rate override. Approval trail mandatory.
Management_Response: IT team notified. System change in UAT.

Finding: Sanction letters missing mandatory HDFC Bank merger disclaimer text.
Recommendation: Updated template to be deployed. Existing letters to be supplemented.
Management_Response: Template updated. Supplementary letters being sent.
